images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a long corridor of identical glowing terminal screens repeating into the shadows, each displaying the same abstract pattern; in the foreground an engineer walks away from them toward a bright drafting table holding a luminous network blueprint. Leaving repetition behind for design work. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent on one repeated screen — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. No readable text, letters, or numbers anywhere. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
